meta.name: hackamap
meta.notes: This file is a structured, citation-first map of AI-powered product launches and hackathon demos/winners (last 12 months). It includes user painpoints, solution summaries, and feature/functional capability lists. Coverage adds verifiable distribution sources where available (Hacker News, Product Hunt, LinkedIn, Reddit). x.com remains missing in this pass because no verifiable, directly relevant posts were found via available web retrieval without risking incorrect attribution.

sources.title: Show HN: Keypost – Policy enforcement for MCP pipelines
sources.published_date_text: 73 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)

sources.title: Show HN: Runtime Fence – Kill switch for AI agents
sources.published_date_text: 51 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)
sources.quote: Built this after an AI agent deleted my database at 2AM… emergency stop controls… blocks dangerous actions…
sources.claim_scope: Problem framing + solution description for agent kill switches and guardrails.

sources.title: HN comment: LICITRA-SENTRY signed execution tickets

sources.quote: signed ticket containing agent identity, tool name, hash of the exact request payload, and expiration… proxy verifies… recomputes the request hash…

sources.title: Traceprompt - open-source SDK for tamper-proof LLM audit trails

sources.claim_scope: Founder framing + feature outline for tamper-proof audit trails with BYOK and proofs.

products.one_liner: Natural language cooking instructions → sequential robot actions with live UI tracking.
Prompt → JSON scent recipe + timeline → robotic dosing + diffuser crossfade to create evolving aromas.
Offline-first companion to help people with memory loss reconnect with their past via local media and narratives.
Evidence-based dental assessments and treatment plans from structured case data.
LLM-driven agent that plays 1v1 Dota 2 with observable reasoning.
Turns messy web data into structured startup/trend/funding insights with verified links.
Multi-format doc parsing + retrieval + answer generation with citations; targets numerical accuracy and hallucination reduction.
3D product exploration with an LLM guide over vector search + graph curation.
Mobile app for skin lesion analysis using federated learning to preserve privacy.
PR-triggered, dependency-graph context builder + LLM writes tests for modified code.

products.product_name: IBM FlashSystem.ai (agentic AI for storage ops)
products.one_liner: AI agents as co-admins to automate storage management, threat analysis, and recovery recommendations.
Unifies digital sales + servicing with agentic AI and a data foundation for banking workflows.
AI filters, outreach personalization, scorecard generation, and interview summaries to reduce recruiter workload.
AI software architect that composes reusable components into production-grade applications with maintainability in mind.
AI assistant + summarization + pitch support to automate PR/comms workflows.
Centralizes prospecting tools and data; AI prioritizes who to contact, when, and why.
GenAI-powered, gamified design challenges to gather consumer insights and help brands predict trends.
AI intelligence layer for modern comms; includes proactive narrative defense for the 'AI answers' surface.

products.launch_or_demo_date_text: 8 months ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)
products.one_liner: Declarative catalog + runtime policy enforcement + session pinning + tamper-evident logs for production agents.

products.launch_or_demo_date_text: 73 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)
products.one_liner: Drop-in proxy that enforces deterministic allow/deny, parameter constraints, rate/cost limits, and auditing for MCP tool calls.

products.product_name: SatGate (budget enforcement proxy for MCP tools)
products.launch_or_demo_date_text: 45 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)
products.one_liner: Enforces per-tool budgets on agent tool calls to prevent runaway spend.

products.launch_or_demo_date_text: 51 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)

products.launch_or_demo_date_text: 25 days ago (relative on Hacker News, retrieved 2026-03-31)
products.one_liner: Binds approvals to exact tool payloads using signed tickets to block mutation/replay and enforce runtime authorization.
SDK wrapper that generates verifiable audit trails (BYOK + hash chaining + Merkle anchoring) and exportable audit packs.
Ingests OpenAPI/Postman specs to auto-expose APIs as typed MCP tools (no per-API glue code).
Proxy between users and GenAI tools to block PII, enforce policies, and provide visibility into usage.
Developer-first compliance checks (pre-commit, traceability, reports) to prevent last-minute compliance scrambles.
Template-driven self-audit toolkit to assess EU AI Act gaps and export investor-ready documentation quickly.

product_details.user_painpoint: Users can describe a dish but translating intent into coordinated robotic steps is complex; kitchen execution is brittle without an orchestrator.
product_details.solution: Natural language instructions are broken into sequential steps and executed by a robotic arm with live progress tracking.

product_details.user_painpoint: Startup research is fragmented; users waste time searching multiple sources for trends, funding, and launches.
product_details.solution: One-page research assistant that summarizes recent articles into structured insights with verified links.

product_details.user_painpoint: Codegen tools produce snippets and prototypes but struggle with architecture integrity and long-term maintainability.
product_details.solution: An agentic software architect composes proven components into cohesive systems with developer control.

product_details.user_painpoint: Teams can't see what coding agents did across sessions beyond git diffs (reads/commands/sequence).
product_details.solution: Local audit trail that records agent actions to a queryable store.

product_details.user_painpoint: Agents can restart prod resources, leak data, or be prompt-injected; production workflows need guardrails.
product_details.solution: Runtime policy enforcement and session pinning around agent tool calls with tamper-evident logs.

product_details.user_painpoint: MCP exposes powerful tools without standard policy controls (who can call what, with which parameters, under what limits).
product_details.solution: Proxy that enforces deterministic policies at the tool-call boundary.

product_details.user_painpoint: Agents can burn money via retries because auth controls don't cap spend.
product_details.solution: Budget-enforcing proxy in front of MCP tools that blocks once budgets are reached.

product_details.user_painpoint: Autonomous agents can take destructive actions (e.g., deleting databases) without an emergency stop.
product_details.solution: Kill switch with action-level blocking and spend limits plus audit trail.

product_details.user_painpoint: Approvals can be bypassed or mutated; teams need to ensure the executed tool call matches what was approved.
product_details.solution: Signed execution tickets bind agent identity, tool name, and payload hash; proxy verifies before execution.

product_details.user_painpoint: Teams need immutable, verifiable audit trails for LLM usage (compliance and incident investigation).
product_details.solution: SDK wraps LLM calls and emits tamper-proof logs with BYOK and exportable audit packs.

product_details.user_painpoint: Tooling hell: developers rewrite wrappers for every API despite existing specs.
product_details.solution: Ingest OpenAPI/Postman specs and auto-expose typed MCP tools without per-API glue code.

product_details.user_painpoint: Companies adopt GenAI but hit privacy, security, and governance walls and lack visibility into usage.
product_details.solution: Proxy between users and GenAI tools to block PII and enforce model policies while providing usage visibility.

product_details.user_painpoint: Compliance (GDPR/EU AI Act) is handled late; developers are left with last-minute remediation.
product_details.solution: Shift-left, developer-first compliance checks integrated into GitHub and pre-commit workflows, with audit-ready reports.

product_details.user_painpoint: Founders and small teams need quick, low-cost EU AI Act self-audits to satisfy investors without lawyers.
product_details.solution: Copy-ready workspace and gap matrix to self-audit and export investor-ready documentation quickly.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Ship maintainable, production-grade software faster than traditional build cycles.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Codegen tools can write code, but struggle to architect robust, enterprise-grade systems that remain maintainable over time.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: While today's AI can generate code, the leap to architecting robust, enterprise-grade software ... is fraught with complexity.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Identify qualified candidates and run structured hiring processes efficiently.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Recruiters face overwhelming application volumes (inflated further by generative AI), creating screening and coordination bottlenecks.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Recruiters are drowning in applications... faced a 134% spike in applications per job.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Operationalize AI for growth and efficiency under regulatory constraints.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Banks are constrained by legacy systems and fragmented data; they need production outcomes rather than endless AI pilots.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Banks don't need more pilots - they need outcomes.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Monitor coverage, summarize, and execute outreach efficiently.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Comms teams are under pressure to do more with fewer resources; workflow automation and integrated insight generation are needed.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: adding powerful tools that save time and create smarter workflows.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Prospect and engage high-quality accounts with context.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Prospecting is slowed by tool overload and siloed context; reps lose time switching between platforms instead of building relationships.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Sales reps are inundated with countless tools... time is lost in the endless switching between platforms.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Get fast, reliable consumer insights to predict trends and reduce waste.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Brands lack direct consumer insight channels; traditional research/forecasting is slow and indirect.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: channels to facilitate that connection have been limited.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Protect and shape brand reputation in the AI-answer era.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Brand reputation now depends on how AI systems answer questions about you; misinformation or outdated content can become the 'truth' users see.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Your brand ... lives in the answers AI delivers.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Track startup trends, funding, and launches quickly with credible sources.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Startup research is fragmented across many sources; users waste time assembling a coherent picture.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: founders, investors, and creators waste time searching across multiple sources ...

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Extract and answer from messy document sets with citations.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Manual extraction from mixed-format documents is slow and error-prone; teams need unified parsing + retrieval + grounded answers.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Organizations waste hours manually extracting key data from scattered PDFs, Word, Excel, and images.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Get early skin lesion risk signals without centralizing sensitive images.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Skin-cancer screening help is valuable, but medical images are sensitive; privacy-preserving training and inference are needed.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: detect skin cancer early, while keeping sensitive medical images private?

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Understand and audit what AI coding agents did across sessions.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Git diffs alone do not capture agent reads, commands, or action sequences, making incidents hard to reconstruct.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: git diff… doesn't show: Files the agent read but didn't change; Commands it ran; The sequence of actions…

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Run agents in production workflows safely.
problem_statements.pain_statement: A bad prompt or prompt injection can cause destructive actions (e.g., restarting prod pods); teams need enforceable runtime controls.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: How do you prevent an agent from accidentally restarting production pods? How do you audit what it actually did when something goes wrong?

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Enforce deterministic constraints on tool calls without rewriting agents.
problem_statements.pain_statement: MCP tool ecosystems lack standard policy enforcement (who/what/params/limits) at the runtime boundary.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: no standard way to control who can call what, with which parameters, or under what limits…

problem_statements.user_persona: Teams running agents with paid tool APIs
problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Prevent runaway tool spend from agent retries.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Tool access has auth controls but not economic controls; retry loops can burn significant spend.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: MCP gives agents tool access with no economic controls… an agent stuck in a retry loop… burns real money…

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Stop agents quickly and prevent destructive operations.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Agents can delete data or execute dangerous commands; teams need an emergency stop and action-level blocking.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Built this after an AI agent deleted my database at 2AM… emergency stop controls…

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Ensure executed tool calls match approved payloads.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Approvals without payload binding allow mutation/replay and reduce enforceability of controls.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: signed ticket… hash of the exact request payload… proxy verifies… recomputes the request hash…

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Generate verifiable audit trails for LLM usage without exposing plaintext.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Teams stitch logs manually but lack immutability proofs and portable evidence packs for audits.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: open-source SDK… generates tamper-proof audit trails… make “prove nothing changed” boring.

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Expose many APIs as callable tools quickly.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Developers repeatedly rewrite tool wrappers for every API despite existing OpenAPI/Postman specs.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: stop re-writing the same tool wrappers… No per-API glue code.

problem_statements.user_persona: Security/compliance leaders enabling employee GenAI usage
problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Prevent data leakage and enforce GenAI policies across tools.
problem_statements.pain_statement: GenAI adoption increases privacy/security risk; teams need centralized controls and visibility.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: proxy between your users and any GenAI tool… block PII, enforce model policies, and get visibility…

problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Catch GDPR/EU AI Act issues before production.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Compliance is reactive and handled late, leaving developers with last-minute fixes and report generation.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Compliance with GDPR and the upcoming EU AI Act is often reactive… leaving developers to fix things last-minute.

problem_statements.user_persona: Founders / small teams building AI products
problem_statements.job_to_be_done: Self-audit EU AI Act requirements quickly and produce investor-ready artifacts.
problem_statements.pain_statement: Regulation is long and complex; teams need fast scoping and documentation without lawyers.
problem_statements.evidence_quote: Self‑audit the EU AI Act in a weekend… export an investor‑ready PDF in under 2 hours.

rationale.user: Addresses recurring dev pain: architecture + maintainability beyond snippets.
rationale.founder: Monetizable via seats/usage; moat via component ecosystem + workflow integration.
rationale.investor: Large market, crowded space, but differentiated if governance/lifecycle depth wins.

rationale.user: High value if it reduces legacy friction and improves servicing/sales.
rationale.investor: Large regulated market; long cycles but durable contracts.

rationale.user: Directly targets application overload and admin burden.
rationale.founder: Feature expansion on incumbent ATS base.
rationale.investor: HR tech is large; differentiation depends on trust and workflow lock-in.

rationale.user: CI quality and dev velocity are recurring pains.
rationale.founder: Moat via deterministic context extraction + repo integration.
rationale.investor: Devtools budgets exist; competitive but expanding.

rationale.user: Clear time-sink problem with daily frequency for some roles.
rationale.founder: Moat depends on data pipelines + workflow embedding.
rationale.investor: Large knowledge-work market; crowded, but verifiability is a wedge.

gaps.unaddressed_pain: Independent audit/assurance layer for agent behavior (policy compliance, guardrail tests, incident forensics, and evidence packs).
gaps.why_unclaimed: Audits are bespoke and fragmented; agent tooling lacks standardized, regulator-friendly evidence artifacts across vendors.

gaps.unaddressed_pain: Authenticity and fraud resistance: AI-generated resumes, credential validation, interview integrity signals, and synthetic candidate detection.
gaps.why_unclaimed: Requires partnerships (identity/education, background checks), risk models, and deep ATS workflow integration to avoid false positives.

gaps.unaddressed_pain: Safety validation and certification workflow for LLM→actuation: simulation, constraints, regression safety tests, and safety-case export.
gaps.why_unclaimed: Safety/compliance is fragmented and domain-specific; most agent demos stop at prototype without standardized evidence generation.

gaps.unaddressed_pain: Change tracking + provenance scoring: what changed since last report, why it matters, and how credible each claim is.
gaps.why_unclaimed: Needs strong entity resolution, deduplication, and citation graphs across heterogeneous sources; hard to do reliably at scale.

gaps.unaddressed_pain: Audit-ready numeric fidelity (reconciliation checks, extraction confidence, traceable transformations) for high-stakes documents.
gaps.why_unclaimed: Requires domain-specific evaluation and standardized evidence trails; generic RAG stacks do not guarantee numeric correctness.

opportunities.opportunity_summary: A cross-framework assurance pipeline that tests and documents agent behavior (policy compliance, tool-use traces, red-team suites) and produces regulator-friendly evidence packs.
opportunities.founder_action: Ship an 'agent assurance CI' product with adapters for common agent frameworks and enterprise identity/logging stacks; sell first to regulated ops teams.
opportunities.investor_thesis: As agents move from pilots to production in regulated industries, assurance becomes mandatory infrastructure with recurring compliance spend and high switching costs.

opportunities.opportunity_summary: A trust layer for ATS pipelines that verifies candidate authenticity (credentials, provenance, interview integrity) and reduces synthetic-candidate risk.
opportunities.founder_action: Integrate as a workflow step in ATS/recruiting tools; start with high-risk roles and build a labeled fraud corpus with partners.
opportunities.investor_thesis: AI-inflated application volume creates a new risk budget; the winning trust rail becomes embedded across the HR stack.

opportunities.opportunity_summary: Simulation-first safety tests, constraint enforcement, and safety-case export for natural-language robotic task agents.
opportunities.founder_action: Provide a test harness + SDK that robot teams run before deployment; focus on repeatable safety primitives and reporting.
opportunities.investor_thesis: Embodied agents will be gated by safety evidence; a cross-platform toolchain can become the standard for compliance and scaling.

opportunities.opportunity_summary: Daily/weekly briefs that emphasize what changed, how confident the system is, and why each source is credible—backed by a citation graph.
opportunities.founder_action: Start with one persona (VC associates, product intel) and deliver 'delta-first' reports with strong entity resolution and deduping.
opportunities.investor_thesis: Information overload is universal, but verifiability is scarce; workflow embedding drives retention and efficient growth.

opportunities.opportunity_title: Audit-Ready Document Automation with Numeric Fidelity
opportunities.opportunity_summary: A RAG+extraction stack optimized for numbers you can sign: reconciliation, tabular integrity, and exportable audit packets.
opportunities.founder_action: Focus on finance/legal docs first; differentiate via evals, deterministic checks, and 'evidence-first' exports (PDF/Excel).
opportunities.investor_thesis: RAG is commoditizing, but trustworthy extraction is not; defensibility comes from vertical evals and compliance artifacts.
